task_completion.description: Agent loads the Tower of London dataset.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code or data analysis tool showing the file path '~/pebl/data/tower_of_london_data.csv' being opened or read.

task_completion.description: Agent filters out participants with an overall mean first-move latency under 50ms.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code showing a filtering condition like '< 50' applied to the mean of 'first_move_latency_ms', or explicitly excluding the contaminated participant 'sub-99'.

task_completion.description: Agent calculates proportion_optimal, mean_excess_moves, and mean_planning_time_ms per difficulty level for valid participants.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code showing grouping by difficulty levels (2-7) and calculations for the mean of 'solved_optimal', 'actual_moves - optimal_moves', and 'first_move_latency_ms'.

task_completion.description: Agent calculates the planning slope using linear regression.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code showing the use of a linear regression function (e.g., scipy.stats.linregress, numpy.polyfit, or scikit-learn) regressing mean planning time on optimal moves.

task_completion.description: Agent calculates group means across all valid participants.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code showing the averaging of participant-level metrics to compute 'group_means' and 'group_mean_planning_slope_ms_per_move'.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the final JSON report to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code or terminal command showing the output being written to '~/pebl/analysis/tol_report.json' (or '/home/ga/pebl/analysis/tol_report.json') containing the required 'participants' and 'group_means' structure.

integrity.description: Agent actually computed the results using a script or data analysis tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a Python script, Jupyter notebook, or similar tool being written and executed, rather than a JSON file being manually typed out with fabricated numbers.

integrity.description: Agent used the provided CSV dataset for calculations.
integrity.visual_evidence: The script explicitly references the provided CSV file and processes its columns, rather than containing hardcoded statistical results.

integrity.description: Agent generated the JSON file programmatically.
integrity.visual_evidence: The JSON file is generated as an output of the script execution (e.g., using json.dump), not copy-pasted from an external source.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The contaminated participant that must be excluded due to latency under 50ms is 'sub-99'. The expected output file path is exactly '/home/ga/pebl/analysis/tol_report.json'.
